zh.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville於1215年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素。她於1232年與John de Swinburne在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1313年在英國諾圖波藍德勒頓享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville于1215年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德卡素。她于1232年与John de Swinburne在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1313年在英国諾圖波藍德勒頓享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Avicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville was born in 1215, in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. She married John de Swinburne in 1232, in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died about 1313, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville est née en 1215, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John de Swinburne en 1232, à Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1313, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville wurde 1215 in Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1232 in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom John de Swinburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb um 1313 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Chollerton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville è nata il nel 1215 nel Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato John de Swinburne nel 1232, nel Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì circa 1313, nel Chollerton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfrevilleは1215年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで生まれた。1232年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクウエルパントンでJohn de Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1313年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville(은)는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커크화핀그턴에서 John de Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1313년 영국 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville nasceu em 1215, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John de Swinburne em 1232, em Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1313, em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville родилась в 1215 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Swinburne в 1232 г. в местности киркуелпингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла около 1313 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Avicia de Umfreville nació en 1215, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con John de Swinburne en 1232, en Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1313, en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 99 años.
